BetWaysTitle.comment: Both %{2025}, %{32400} will be appropriately formatted according to the language requirement. Please do not translate.

DreamOfMacauRules.Rule1: Dreams of Macau is a 6-reel, 5-row video slot (with an additional reel on top of reel 2, 3, 4 and 5) featuring sticky Wilds-on-the-Way and free spins with increasing multiplier.

Rule2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{2025} ways - %{32400} ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
Rule2.comment: Both %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced by the currency symbol, do not translate. Both %{2025} and %{32400} will be formatted accordingly, do not translate.
Rule2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for 2,025 ways - 32,400 ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.1 to 8.

DreamOfMacauRules.Rule3: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
DreamOfMacauRules.Rule4: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
DreamOfMacauRules.Rule5: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

DreamOfMacauWild.WildExplain1: During any spins, some symbols (excluding Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) in reels 2, 3, 4 and/or 5 that occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces may have a silver frame around itself.
DreamOfMacauWild.WildExplain2: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any silver-framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into a randomly selected symbol (other than Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) with a gold frame around itself.
DreamOfMacauWild.WildExplain3: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any gold-framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into Wild symbol.
DreamOfMacauWild.WildExplain4: The number indicated at the top portion of the Wild symbol represents the number of the times the Wild symbol can be used in a winning combination before it destroys itself.
DreamOfMacauWild.WildExplain5: If a Wild symbol is involved in a win and the number at the top portion of the Wild symbol indicates a value of 2 or more, the Wild symbol will not destroy itself in the next round and that value is deducted by 1.
DreamOfMacauWild.WildExplain6: If a Wild symbol is involved in a win and the number at the top portion of the Wild symbol indicates a value of 1, the Wild symbol will destroy itself in the next round.

DreamOfMacauSymbolRules.Rule1: Some symbols in reels 2, 3, 4 and/or 5 may occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces and each of these symbols will represent as a single symbol during payout calculations.
DreamOfMacauSymbolRules.Rule2: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
DreamOfMacauSymbolRules.Rule3: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 only.

DreamOfMacauFreeSpinFeatures.FreeSpinExplain1: 4 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 15 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
DreamOfMacauFreeSpinFeatures.FreeSpinExplain2: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the win multiplier is x1.
DreamOfMacauFreeSpinFeatures.FreeSpinExplain3: During any free spin, if there are one or more winning symbols on the reels, after wins are paid and the new symbols have cascaded down, the win multiplier will be increased by 1.
